title: Automation World in Seoul to feature Chinese humanoid makers
description:
The 'Big 5' humanoid robot manufacturers will participate in the China Humanoid Robot Conference as part of AW 2026.

The post Automation World in Seoul to feature Chinese humanoid makers appeared first on The Robot Report.
